command: OPENAI_KEY=$(grep '^OPENAI_API_KEY=' /opt/p0-foundation/.env | cut -d= -f2-) && if [ -z "$OPENAI_KEY" ]; then echo 'ERROR: OPENAI_API_KEY empty in p0 .env'; exit 1; fi && if grep -q OPENAI_API_KEY /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Already exists, updating...'; sed -i '/^OPENAI_API_KEY=/d' /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env; fi && echo "OPENAI_API_KEY=$OPENAI_KEY" >> /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env && echo 'OK: OPENAI_API_KEY added to claude.env' && echo '--- Verify ---' && gre
intent: add OPENAI_API_KEY and PG_URL to claude.env for vector MCP server
